ORDER ON DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS' 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS DBA CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-23-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS DBA CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES DECEDENT WAS NEGLECTED FOR LONG PERIOD OF TIMES AND THAT CONDUCT CAN CONSTITUTE RECKLESS CONDUCT TO SUPPORT THE CLAIM UNDER DELANEY V. BAKER (1999) 20 CAL.4TH 23. THE COURT OVERRULES THE DEMURRER TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE PLAINTIFF ALLEGES SUFFICIENT FACTS TO SUPPORT THE CLAIM. THE COURT SUSTAINS WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT ALLEGE SUFFICIENT FACTS THAT HE WAS PRESENT AT THE SCENE OF THE INJURY PRODUCING EVENT AT THE TIME IT OCCURRED. SEE THING V. LA CHUSA (1989) 48 CAL.3D 644, 647. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS DBA CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled as to the first cause of action. Plaintiff alleges decedent was neglected for long period of times and that conduct can constitute reckless conduct to support the claim under Delaney v. Baker (1999) 20 Cal.4th 23. The Court overrules the demurrer to the third cause of action because plaintiff alleges sufficient facts to support the claim. The Court sustains without leave to amend as to the fourth cause of action. Plaintiff does not allege sufficient facts that he was present at the scene of the injury producing event at the time it occurred. See Thing v. La Chusa (1989) 48 Cal.3d 644, 647. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-26-2013 Continued To Jul-23-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
